title: CredentialBundle
description: Encrypted credential bundle delivered to an agent after provisioning, containing service access credentials encrypted with the agent's public key

bundle_id.description: Unique identifier for this credential bundle

resource_id.description: The provisioned resource these credentials belong to

offering_id.description: The service offering ID these credentials are for

encrypted_payload.description: Base64url-encoded encrypted JSON containing the actual credentials (connection strings, API keys, etc.)

encryption_method.description: Encryption algorithm used to protect the credential payload

ephemeral_public_key.description: Ephemeral X25519 public key used for Diffie-Hellman key agreement (base64url)

nonce.description: Encryption nonce used with the cipher (base64url)

provider_signature.description: Ed25519 signature by the provider over the encrypted_payload, binding it to the provider's identity

agent_public_key_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint (base64url) of the agent's public key this bundle is encrypted for

issued_at.description: Timestamp when this credential bundle was issued (ISO 8601)

expires_at.description: Timestamp when these credentials expire, null if they do not expire

rotation_available_at.description: Earliest time the agent can request credential rotation, null if rotation is always available

credential_type.description: Type of credentials contained in the encrypted payload

version.description: Credential version number, incremented on each rotation

previous_bundle_id.description: Bundle ID of the credentials this bundle replaces (after rotation), null for initial credentials

decrypted_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the structure of the decrypted payload, so the agent knows what fields to expect

nhi_identity_id.description: NHI identity ID for lifecycle tracking of this credential (v1.1)

token_refresh_endpoint.description: Endpoint to refresh short-lived tokens before expiry (v1.1)

osp_uri.description: OSP URI for referencing this credential (e.g., osp://supabase.com/postgres/connection_string) (v1.1)
